fieldDescription: List of industry IDs exempt from the Heavy Industry negating factor. This setting has no effect if the Heavy Industry negating factor is disabled.
"The faithful turn away from worlds scarred by mankind's excess; such places remind them of the sins that called the Great Collapse."
"Great furnaces and automated forges are monuments to mankind's pride - the very hubris Ludd taught us to abandon."
"Without simple rural work, the colony feels rootless, detached from the humble labors that honor Ludd's example."
"A world where life struggles to exist is taken as a sign: some places were not meant for humanity to tame, but to respect from afar."
"The colony's leadership actively suppresses the Luddic faithful, preventing their influence from spreading."
